positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a sleeping fox curled on a smooth, crystalline surface. The fox should be rendered in deep indigo and earthy ochre tones, utilizing clean, strong silhouettes against a subtle gradient background of pale lavender and cream. The overall composition must be centered and symmetrical, with the fox forming the primary focal point. High contrast is essential. Style should be a blend of modern Scandinavian illustration and Art Nouveau poster art, emphasizing graceful curves and simplified forms. Vector art style, solid color blocks, suitable for screen printing on apparel, perfect symmetry, detailed linework, clean edges. Overhead, studio lighting. --ar 1:1
negative: low quality, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, blurry, grainy, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, photorealistic, 3d render, distorted, artifacts, extra limbs, asymmetrical
